# Code Commute

> A software engineering vlog by Nick Cosentino (Dev Leader). Each episode answers
> a viewer-submitted question about software engineering, career growth, AI tools,
> or management and leadership — recorded during the daily commute.
>
> Nick is a software engineer and engineering manager with experience across the full
> stack: distributed systems, .NET, C#, career development, and leading engineering teams.
> All content is first-person perspective based on real-world experience.

## Episodes
